description:
FRAC-178 already shipped (lazy-load WebGL, dropped poster preload, narrow fonts) and home page first-paint is still unacceptable on phones. The site is about to launch as a serious business landing — first-paint must be pristine, above industry-standard. Approach: run a triple-force review (Claude + Codex + Gemini) from a senior-software-engineer perspective on the entire home page load path, then act on the consolidated findings.

Why: home page is the entry door for a high-stakes business launch. Sub-second first-paint on cellular phones is table stakes for a serious tech brand.

Scope: full waterfall — bundle/chunk strategy, font loading, image strategy, render-blocking CSS, third-party scripts, route hydration, WebGL hydration timing, preload/prefetch hints, cache headers, edge config, and any other levers. Mobile-first (375px / 3G baseline).
title: Home page loading optimization — pristine production perf
